Review_Text: The food quality was exceptional and fresh, but the service was slow and the prices are way too high.
Loved the ambiance and the friendly staff, though the menu options are limited.
Horrible experience. The restaurant is dirty, the bathroom is disgusting, and the wait time was forever.
Perfect location with great views. The wine selection is amazing. Highly recommended!
The pasta was overcooked, the sauce lacked flavor, and the waiter was rude.
Excellent presentation and beautiful plating. Service was attentive and prices are reasonable.
Cold food served late. The noise level made conversation impossible. Staff seemed disinterested.
Best restaurant in town! Everything was perfect - food, service, atmosphere, and value for money.
